name: Wine Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in 5 minutes of cold water.
2. Dissolve the softened gelatin in boiling water.
3. Add sugar, salt, lemon juice, and orange juice. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
4. Stir in the wine until blended.
5. Pour into an oiled mold.
6. Refrigerate overnight or until well set.
7. Unmold and serve.
